creator: jgh@experts-exchange.com
text:
This patch fixes two items and adds license acceptance dialog.

1) previously has not packaged correctly to start the daemon, and it would fail to start.
2) doesn't properly handle status/stop once service is started

PR's 'ports/149848' and 'ports/150538' are included in this patch and can be closed.

How-To-Repeat: 1) run 'make package,' and then /usr/local/etc/rc.d/tomcat55 start (this would fail)
2) install www/tomcat55
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/tomcat55 start
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/tomcat55 status ( should show not running)
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/tomcat55 stop ( should show not running and to check pid file )
